items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 16 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「AWS GraphRAG deployment cuts drug research cycles by 87%」、「OpenAI finds roughly 30 percent of popular AI coding test is broken」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。

items.title: AWS GraphRAG deployment cuts drug research cycles by 87%
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「大模型训练、推理、RAG、后训练或评测」。原文摘要显示：A recent AWS GraphRAG deployment reduced drug research and development cycles in pharmaceutical environments by 87 percent. This acceleration is achieved by integrating previously separated proprietary databases into a …
items.insightText: 关注数据、训练、推理、RAG 或评测设计，评估是否能沉淀到轨迹/地址大模型架构。

items.title: OpenAI finds roughly 30 percent of popular AI coding test is broken
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「Agent Skill、Harness、工具调用和自动化研发」。原文摘要显示：OpenAI reviewed SWE-Bench Pro, a widely used test for measuring AI models' programming skills, and found roughly 30 percent of its tasks are broken. The company is pulling its earlier endorsement of the benchmark. The a…

items.title: OpenAI's AI beats every human at AtCoder, a top competitive programming contest
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「AI 技术演进和可复用工程实践」。原文摘要显示：At the AtCoder World Tour Finals 2026, an OpenAI system crushed all human competitors in an exhibition match, solving all five problems in the Algorithm Division. Two of those problems were rated exceptionally difficult…
items.insightText: 先快速判断它是否包含可复用方法、架构或工程经验，再决定是否进入日报深读。
